title: trifolium polystachyum var. psoraleoides
intro: Trifolium polystachyum var. psoraleoides, also known as the psoralea clover, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, which is native to the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to promote cell regeneration, reduce inflammation, and stimulate the production of collagen. The health benefits of Trifolium polystachyum var. psoraleoides include its potential to improve skin health, reduce the appearance of wrinkles, and enhance the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into capsules or teas, or used in topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
